svg.desc: Supplementary Figure S1. Evidence hierarchy and claim-boundary matrix. The schematic summarizes the ordered evidence layers and separates allowed association-only interpretations from excluded causal, structural, endotype, clinical-prediction and therapeutic claims.

path.aria-label: Supplementary Figure S1. Evidence hierarchy and claim-boundary matrix
Evidence layers are ordered by proximity to the manuscript claim; all claims remain association-only.
Use S1 as an audit map: it explains how the figures
support a bounded interpretation but does not add a new
Supplementary Figure S1. Evidence hierarchy and claim-boundary matrix.
Schematic separates allowed association-only interpretations from excluded causal, clinical and therapeutic claims.
